source: Ronaldo frustrated as Congo stun Portugal in draw
Congo DR produced a stunning result at the 2026 World Cup, as the African side held one of the pre-tournament favorites, Portugal, to a 1-1 draw in Houston on Wednesday.

Ivory Coast's Elye Wahi arrested for spot-fixing
Ivory Coast's Elye Wahi, who is playing at the 2026 World Cup, was arrested for alleged spot-fixing just a couple of weeks before the tournament began, ABC News confirmed on Wednesday.
